name: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc.
description: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc. is a technology company that develops and fields transformative, affordable systems, platforms, and products for national security and communications. The company specializes in unmanned systems, satellite communications, cyber security/warfare, microwave electronics, missile defense, and training and combat systems. Kratos is known for its high-performance jet-powered unmanned aerial target drones and tactical UAVs, as well as its ground-based command and control systems for satellites. By leveraging commercial technology and rapid development cycles, Kratos provides cost-effective solutions to the U.S. Department of Defense, intelligence agencies, and international allies.
